data.title: [dso:sprint skill loader]: Skill invoked but content not injected into context -> orchestrator never executes sprint workflow
data.description: CHRONIC INTERMITTENT P0. In a host project session, invoking dso:sprint via the Skill tool returns 'Successfully loaded skill' but the skill content is never injected into the agent context. The orchestrator receives no instructions and falls back to asking the user what to do (offering manual orchestration, checking skill config, etc.). The skill call loop repeats 2-3 times with the same result. Root cause unknown — may be plugin cache miss, Skill tool timeout, or skill content exceeding injection limit. Requires maximum escalation: bot-psychologist + empirical reproduction in host project session.
